title: how old was the Sub Commander of Nerv
display_title: how old was the Sub Commander of Nerv
wikitext:
[]: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Mar 05, 2005 9:42 pm I'm making another attempt to write a fanfic but i need to know Fuyutski's age first. Its a crossover between EVA and Stargate SG-1 if you wanted to know.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Mar 05, 2005 10:04 pm I beleive he was in his early fifties

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Mar 05, 2005 10:15 pm ok then, i guess ill have to modify it to Keel, no prob, it fits better anyway.

[]: Re: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 06, 2005 8:36 am ChronoX wrote: I'm making another attempt to write a fanfic but i need to know Fuyutski's age first. Its a crossover between EVA and Stargate SG-1 if you wanted to know.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sun Mar 06, 2005 9:59 am Ok, thanks.

[]: Re: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 06, 2005 8:55 pm Mr. Tines wrote: It's 9-Apr-57 - my recollection was off by one in the month

[]: Re: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 07, 2005 1:48 pm Reichu wrote: Mr. Tines wrote: It's 9-Apr-57 - my recollection was off by one in the month

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 07, 2005 10:14 pm If only these varied websites provided the source where they found this stuff, we could check its canonicity... Or maybe it's in one of the books I have and I'm just not paying enough attention.

[]:             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Mar 09, 2005 1:47 pm Reichu wrote: If only these varied websites provided the source where they found this stuff, we could check its canonicity... Or maybe it's in one of the books I have and I'm just not paying enough attention.

[]: Re: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Wed Mar 09, 2005 1:55 pm Mr. Tines wrote: ChronoX wrote: I'm making another attempt to write a fanfic but i need to know Fuyutski's age first. Its a crossover between EVA and Stargate SG-1 if you wanted to know.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Fri Oct 20, 2006 10:56 pm Wik says half of the time (baka edit war) that Fuyutsuki's birthday is April 57' while Gendo's is 67'.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat Oct 21, 2006 11:03 am LordBlank wrote: Wik says half of the time (baka edit war) that Fuyutsuki's birthday is April 57' while Gendo's is 67'.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 21, 2006 11:09 am Most sources give their ages as 58 and 48 respectively, so do the math... Of course there is the little issue of when in 2015, and whetehr western or traditional Japanese systems for reckoning dates are used.

[]:             Quote Post by LordBlank » Sat Oct 21, 2006 11:48 am Evangelionfreak wrote: LordBlank wrote: Wik says half of the time (baka edit war) that Fuyutsuki's birthday is April 57' while Gendo's is 67'.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sat Oct 21, 2006 11:50 am LordBlank wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: LordBlank wrote: Wik says half of the time (baka edit war) that Fuyutsuki's birthday is April 57' while Gendo's is 67'.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Sat Oct 21, 2006 1:05 pm Manga lists Fuyutsuki as "about 60" whilst Gendo is listed as 48.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 21, 2006 10:03 pm Looked at the Proposal for the hell of it... Gendo is 48 there, but Kozo is -- wait for it -- 45! Man, talk about evolutionary leaps. Too bad there's no concept art for proto-Fuyutsuki.
summary:
[]: how old was the Sub-Commander of Nerv?             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Mar 05, 2005 9:42 pm I'm making another attempt to write a fanfic but i need to know Fuyutski's age first. Its a crossover between EVA and Stargate SG-1 if you wanted to know.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sat Mar 05, 2005 10:04 pm I beleive he was in his early fifties

[]: &nb
